summary: Plan-mode PR inventory shard. The hydrated artifact reports 16 open PR candidates, no shared canonical, and no security-sensitive items. I classified each PR independently and planned no close, merge, label, comment, fix, or raise-PR action.

actions.reason: Independent open PR with focused implementation and passing proof/check evidence; not a duplicate or close candidate in this shard.
Independent compatibility fix candidate with passing checks but no hydrated maintainer decision to close, merge, or relate it to another PR.
Independent open PR; failed proof blocks merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout, but classification does not require maintainer escalation.
Independent focused gateway fix; no allowed merge action and no duplicate/superseded evidence.
Broad independent feature PR requiring normal maintainer review; no close or merge recommendation is permitted by this shard.
Independent cleanup-only PR; failed proof and disabled low-signal closeout make non-mutating classification the conservative result.
Independent compatibility fix candidate; conflicts/failing checks block merge or fixed-by-candidate closeout, not classification.
Independent Android feature PR with proof and platform checks; no duplicate, superseded, or close evidence in this inventory shard.
Independent, focused ready-for-maintainer PR; no close-style action is supported by the artifact.
Independent Discord lint PR; current evidence does not support closure, and failing lint blocks merge-style conclusions.
Independent ACP extension fix; bot review context and author-waiting status make non-mutating classification appropriate.
Independent maintainer-owned refactor; failing checks and maintainer ownership rule out automated close/merge decisions.
Independent ACP hardening PR; failed proof blocks merge-style action, but no security-sensitive signal was marked in hydrated state.
Independent Telegram bug-fix PR; failing proof/checks prevent any merge or fixed-by-candidate conclusion.
Independent exec/config PR. The artifact does not mark it security-sensitive, but proof failure, dependency churn, and security-boundary risk make only non-mutating classification appropriate.
Independent plugin API PR with unresolved review/proof risk; no close, merge, or fix action is allowed or justified.
